name: Cretan Logistix LLC
recent_news: FMCSA-registered authorized for-hire carrier since Jan 2022 (DOT# 3806761); listed as carrying household goods and passengers from Eastvale, CA. No evidence of school district contracts.
fit_notes: Micro-operator (~3 vehicles) with no confirmed school/SPED contracts; appears general passenger/freight rather than student transportation. Not a meaningful tuck-in target unless drilled into local NEMT/SPED routes.

name: Wings-Halos Non-Emergency
districts_or_customers: Orange County NC area private-pay/Medicaid riders
recent_news: Active NPI-registered NEMT van provider in Hillsborough, NC (NPI 1154987196); no M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Owner-operator NEMT van shop with no confirmed school-bus or SPED route work. Too small and outside Summit's school-transportation focus.

name: Southeast Trans
recent_news: Listed entry shows 2-person operation in Cumming, GA. Name is easily confused with Southeastrans Inc. (Atlanta-based NEMT broker, ~Forsyth/Fulton coverage) — this micro entity is NOT the broker.
fit_notes: Two-person shell — not a school-bus operator. Disambiguation risk vs. Southeastrans Inc. (Medicaid NEMT broker, not a fleet operator anyway). Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Admiral Limousine Svc
principals: George A. Coupe Sr. (CEO, per LinkedIn — possibly different Admiral Limousine entity)
recent_news: Small Savannah-area limousine operator at 1431 King George Blvd. No M&A activity identified; principal name on record (William Byrd) differs from LinkedIn-listed CEO (George A. Coupe Sr.), suggesting possible name conflict with another Admiral Limousine.
fit_notes: Limousine service, not school-bus contractor. The special-needs flag in source data appears to reflect general accessible-transport classification, not SPED routes. Not a Summit fit.

name: Adams PA Trnsprtn LLC
districts_or_customers: Medicaid/MCO-funded riders in Luzerne County PA
recent_news: Active NEMT operator at 101 W Broad St, Hazleton, PA; website confirms NEMT focus (medical appointments, grocery, social rides) with no school-bus offering. No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT van shop, not a yellow-bus contractor or SPED district operator. Too small and off-scope for a Summit School Services tuck-in.
